ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's official website URL */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock at closing */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded prices */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price (accounts for dividends and stock splits) */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid out on the date */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient if a stock split occurred */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who made the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission fee charged for the trade */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Exact time the trade was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Current value of the index */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the index value */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded value */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of trades for the index */,
  "previous_close" REAL /* Closing value of the index on the previous trading day */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening value of the index on the current day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the stock being analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who generated the report */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis report */,
  "report" TEXT /* Content of the analysis report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Short summary of the analysis report */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score indicating the reliability of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the stock related to the report */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the financial year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial report */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue reported */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Operating cash flow */,
  "debt" REAL /* Total debt of the company */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the watchlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist-stock relation */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the stock */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the stock in the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)
